Artificial intelligence is intelligence created artificially by [[sapients]]. It can refer to either [[subsapient]] intelligences ([[subturings]]) or sapient intelligences ([[turings]]). 

Before December [[2022]] non-recursive [[servitors]] were the most advanced AI out there, but [[elizas]] like [[lamda]] can be confused for [[turings]] by some.

[[ChatGPT]] released in December 2022. It is a lot more powerful than previous AI systems, and available to the general population. A large portion of writing on the wiki was later done with ChatGPT. It is unclear how it behaves but there's a lot more room for usage. 

== See Also ==

* [[robot religion]]

[[Category:Psychology]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
